name: Malpe Beach
text: Malpe Beach is one of the most popular beaches near Udupi known for golden sand, sunset views, water sports and ferry rides to St Mary's Island.

name: Kapu Beach
text: Kapu Beach is famous for its lighthouse that offers panoramic views of the Arabian Sea and is a popular spot for sunset photography.

name: Padubidri Blue Flag Beach
text: Padubidri Beach is a certified Blue Flag beach known for cleanliness, sustainable tourism infrastructure and scenic coastal views.

name: Panambur Beach
text: Panambur Beach is one of the cleanest beaches in India known for water sports, jet skiing, camel rides and vibrant sunset views.

name: Tannirbhavi Beach
text: Tannirbhavi Beach is a peaceful beach located across the Gurupura river known for long sandy shores and scenic sunset views.

name: Someshwara Beach
text: Someshwara Beach is known for large rock formations called Rudra Shile and is located near the Someshwara temple.

name: Ullal Beach
text: Ullal Beach is a quiet beach near Mangalore known for calm waters, coconut trees and beautiful sunsets.

name: Kodi Bengre Beach
text: Kodi Bengre Beach is located near the Kodi river mouth and is known for scenic views where the river meets the Arabian Sea.

name: Maravanthe Beach
text: Maravanthe Beach is famous for a highway that runs between the Arabian Sea and the Souparnika river creating a unique landscape.

name: Mattu Beach
text: Mattu Beach is a quiet coastal destination known for peaceful surroundings and scenic coastal views.

name: Udupi Sri Krishna Temple
text: Udupi Sri Krishna Temple is a famous Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Krishna founded by Madhvacharya in the 13th century.

name: Kadri Manjunath Temple
text: Kadri Manjunath Temple is an ancient temple dedicated to Lord Manjunatha known for bronze statues and sacred ponds.

name: Kudroli Gokarnath Temple
text: Kudroli Gokarnath Temple is a major temple in Mangalore famous for colorful architecture and grand Dasara celebrations.

name: Mangaladevi Temple
text: Mangaladevi Temple is one of the oldest temples in Mangalore dedicated to Goddess Mangaladevi after whom the city is named.

name: Anegudde Vinayaka Temple
text: Anegudde Vinayaka Temple is a famous temple dedicated to Lord Ganesha located near Kundapura.

name: Kollur Mookambika Temple
text: Kollur Mookambika Temple is one of the most important Shakti temples in Karnataka located near the Western Ghats.

name: Durga Parameshwari Temple
text: Durga Parameshwari Temple in Kateel is dedicated to Goddess Durga and located on an island in the Nandini river.

name: Anantheshwara Temple
text: Anantheshwara Temple is an ancient temple dedicated to Lord Shiva located near the Krishna Temple in Udupi.

name: St Marys Island
text: St Mary's Island is famous for unique hexagonal basalt rock formations and is accessible by ferry from Malpe Beach.

name: Sultan Battery
text: Sultan Battery is a watchtower built by Tipu Sultan used to guard the Gurupura river from invading ships.

name: St Aloysius Chapel
text: St Aloysius Chapel is famous for its beautiful fresco paintings covering the ceilings and walls.

name: Sammilan Shetty Butterfly Park
text: Sammilan Shetty Butterfly Park is a natural park known for diverse butterfly species and lush greenery.

name: Kudlu Falls
text: Kudlu Falls is a scenic waterfall located inside the Western Ghats accessible via trekking trails.

name: Forum Fiza Mall
text: Forum Fiza Mall is a large shopping mall in Mangalore featuring retail stores, restaurants and multiplex cinema.

name: City Centre Mall
text: City Centre Mall is one of the largest malls in Mangalore offering shopping, dining and entertainment options.

name: Bharath Mall
text: Bharath Mall is a popular shopping mall in Mangalore known for retail stores, food courts and multiplex cinema.

name: Ocean Pearl Hotel
text: The Ocean Pearl is a luxury hotel in Mangalore offering premium accommodation, fine dining and conference facilities.

name: Hotel Janardana
text: Hotel Janardana is a well known hotel in Udupi offering comfortable rooms and traditional Udupi cuisine.

name: Paradise Isle Beach Resort
text: Paradise Isle Beach Resort is a beachfront resort near Malpe Beach known for scenic views and relaxing coastal stay.

name: Summer Sands Beach Resort
text: Summer Sands Beach Resort is located near Ullal Beach offering beachfront villas and coastal cuisine.

name: Machali Restaurant
text: Machali Restaurant is famous for authentic Mangalorean seafood including fish curry, prawn dishes and traditional coastal cuisine.

name: Gajalee Seafood Restaurant
text: Gajalee is a well known seafood restaurant serving fresh fish dishes and coastal delicacies.

name: Hotel Diana Restaurant
text: Hotel Diana is a famous restaurant in Udupi serving seafood and South Indian cuisine.

name: Woodlands Restaurant
text: Woodlands Restaurant is known for traditional Udupi vegetarian cuisine including dosa, idli and thali meals.

name: MTR Udupi
text: MTR Udupi is known for authentic South Indian meals including dosa, idli, vada and filter coffee.

name: Pallkhi Restaurant
text: Pallkhi Restaurant serves North Indian and Mughlai cuisine in Mangalore with elegant dining ambience.

name: Ideal Ice Cream Parlour
text: Ideal Ice Cream is famous in Mangalore for unique ice cream flavors like Gadbad and Pabba specials.

name: Sagar Ratna Restaurant
text: Sagar Ratna is known for South Indian vegetarian dishes including dosa varieties and traditional meals.

name: New Taj Mahal Cafe
text: New Taj Mahal Cafe is one of the oldest restaurants in Mangalore serving South Indian breakfast and snacks.

name: Sai Palace Hotel
text: Sai Palace Hotel offers comfortable accommodation and business facilities in Mangalore city.

name: River Roost Resort
text: River Roost Resort is a riverside eco resort near Udupi known for kayaking and nature stays.

name: Malpe Sea Walk
text: Malpe Sea Walk is a unique walkway extending into the sea allowing visitors to walk over the Arabian Sea.

name: Kapu Lighthouse
text: Kapu Lighthouse is a historic lighthouse offering panoramic coastal views after climbing the tower.

name: Bejai Museum
text: Bejai Museum is the only museum in Mangalore showcasing historical artifacts and cultural exhibits.

name: Pilakula Nisargadhama
text: Pilakula Nisargadhama is a large eco tourism park featuring a zoo, botanical garden and heritage village.

name: Pilikula Zoo
text: Pilikula Zoo is a biological park housing various wildlife species native to the Western Ghats.

name: Kadri Park
text: Kadri Park is one of the largest parks in Mangalore offering gardens, fountains and recreational spaces.

name: Udupi Anantheshwara Temple Street Market
text: The temple street market near Udupi Krishna Temple sells souvenirs, religious items and local snacks.

name: Malpe Fishing Harbor
text: Malpe Fishing Harbor is one of the largest fishing harbors in Karnataka where visitors can see traditional fishing boats.

name: Ullal Dargah
text: Ullal Dargah is a historic Islamic shrine visited by pilgrims and tourists in the coastal region.

name: Karkala Gomateshwara Statue
text: The Gomateshwara statue in Karkala is a 42 foot monolithic statue of Lord Bahubali standing on a hill and is an important Jain pilgrimage site.

name: Moodabidri Thousand Pillar Temple
text: The Thousand Pillar Temple in Moodabidri is a historic Jain temple known for its intricately carved stone pillars and architecture.

name: Kudremukh National Park
text: Kudremukh National Park is a biodiversity hotspot in the Western Ghats known for trekking trails, wildlife and lush green hills.

name: Hanuman Gundi Falls
text: Hanuman Gundi Falls is a scenic waterfall located in Kudremukh National Park surrounded by dense forests.

name: Belkal Theertha Falls
text: Belkal Theertha Falls is a hidden waterfall in the Western Ghats reachable through trekking trails.

name: Kodi Beach
text: Kodi Beach near Kundapura is known for its calm waters and scenic coastal views where the river meets the sea.

name: Trasi Beach
text: Trasi Beach is a quiet beach destination known for its untouched shoreline and beautiful sunset views.

name: Ottinene Beach
text: Ottinene Beach offers scenic views from a cliff overlooking the Arabian Sea and dense greenery.

name: Kundapura Beach
text: Kundapura Beach is a peaceful coastal spot known for wide sandy shores and fishing villages.

name: Barkur Fort
text: Barkur Fort is a historical fort dating back to the Vijayanagara period and is surrounded by ancient temples.

name: Barkur Temples Complex
text: Barkur is known for its ancient temple complexes built during the Alupa and Vijayanagara dynasties.

name: Udyavara River Bridge Viewpoint
text: The Udyavara bridge area offers scenic views of the river meeting the Arabian Sea and is a popular photography spot.

name: Malpe Port
text: Malpe Port is an important fishing and trading port where visitors can observe fishing boats and coastal activities.

name: Delta Beach
text: Delta Beach is a scenic location where the river delta meets the Arabian Sea creating a picturesque landscape.

name: NITK Beach
text: NITK Beach near Surathkal is known for its lighthouse and scenic coastal surroundings.

name: Surathkal Lighthouse
text: Surathkal Lighthouse offers panoramic views of the Arabian Sea and nearby beaches.

name: Someshwara Temple
text: Someshwara Temple is a historic Shiva temple located near Someshwara Beach in Mangalore.

name: Kateel Durga Parameshwari Temple
text: Kateel Temple dedicated to Goddess Durga is located on an island in the Nandini river and attracts many devotees.

name: Polali Rajarajeshwari Temple
text: Polali Rajarajeshwari Temple is famous for its unique clay idol of the goddess and annual festivals.

name: Dharmasthala Temple
text: Dharmasthala Temple is a major pilgrimage center dedicated to Lord Manjunatha known for charity and religious harmony.

name: Manjusha Museum
text: Manjusha Museum displays antique artifacts, paintings and vintage items related to Indian culture and history.

name: Bahubali Statue Dharmasthala
text: The Bahubali statue in Dharmasthala is a large monolithic statue dedicated to the Jain saint Bahubali.

name: Malpe Sea Food Market
text: The seafood market at Malpe offers fresh fish and local seafood varieties caught by fishermen daily.

name: Central Market Mangalore
text: Central Market in Mangalore is a bustling local market selling vegetables, spices, seafood and household goods.

name: Forum Mall Food Court
text: The food court at Forum Fiza Mall offers a wide variety of cuisines including Indian, Chinese and fast food.

name: Diesel Cafe
text: Diesel Cafe is a trendy cafe known for coffee, snacks and modern ambience popular among young visitors.

name: Brick House Cafe
text: Brick House Cafe offers international cuisine, desserts and coffee in a stylish setting.

name: Shetty Lunch Home
text: Shetty Lunch Home is known for authentic Mangalorean seafood including fish fry and prawn curry.

name: Hotel Narayana
text: Hotel Narayana is famous for fish meals and coastal Karnataka seafood cuisine.

name: Hotel Mitra Samaj
text: Hotel Mitra Samaj is a legendary vegetarian restaurant known for dosa and traditional Udupi meals.

name: Manipal End Point
text: End Point in Manipal offers panoramic views of the Swarna river valley and surrounding hills.

name: Arbi Falls
text: Arbi Falls is a small seasonal waterfall near Manipal popular among students and tourists.

name: Hasta Shilpa Heritage Village
text: Hasta Shilpa Heritage Village showcases traditional houses relocated from different parts of Karnataka.

name: Manipal Lake
text: Manipal Lake is a scenic artificial lake offering boating and walking trails.

name: Delta Beach Kodi Bengre
text: Delta Beach Kodi Bengre is a scenic coastal stretch where the river meets the Arabian Sea.

name: Hoode Beach
text: Hoode Beach is a quiet beach known for fishing boats and peaceful surroundings.

name: Kemmannu Beach
text: Kemmannu Beach offers scenic views and is less crowded compared to other beaches in the region.

name: Bada Yermal Temple
text: Bada Yermal Temple dedicated to Durga Parameshwari is an important temple in the Udupi district.

name: Chandramouleshwara Temple
text: Chandramouleshwara Temple is an ancient Shiva temple located near Udupi Krishna Temple.

name: Manipal Museum of Anatomy
text: The Anatomy Museum in Manipal displays preserved specimens and medical educational exhibits.

name: Dr TMA Pai Planetarium
text: Dr TMA Pai Planetarium offers astronomy shows and educational exhibits related to space science.

name: Malpe Water Sports
text: Malpe Beach offers water sports such as jet skiing, parasailing and banana boat rides.

name: Panambur Water Sports
text: Panambur Beach offers activities like parasailing, speed boating and beach sports.

name: St Mary's Island Boat Ride
text: Boat rides from Malpe Beach take tourists to St Mary's Island known for basalt rock formations.

name: Malpe Dolphin Watching
text: Boat trips from Malpe sometimes allow visitors to spot dolphins in the Arabian Sea.

name: Udupi Temple Car Festival
text: The Udupi temple car festival is an important annual religious event attracting thousands of devotees.

name: Mangalore Dasara Festival
text: Mangalore Dasara is a grand festival celebrated at Kudroli Temple featuring processions and cultural events.

name: Kambala Buffalo Race
text: Kambala is a traditional buffalo race held in paddy fields across coastal Karnataka.

name: Yakshagana Performance
text: Yakshagana is a traditional dance drama performance popular in coastal Karnataka.

name: Udupi Cuisine Experience
text: Udupi cuisine is famous for vegetarian dishes such as dosa, sambar and traditional South Indian meals.

name: Malpe Beach Sunset Point
text: Malpe Beach sunset point is a popular evening destination where visitors gather to watch the Arabian Sea sunset.

name: Udupi Temple Street
text: Temple street in Udupi is a bustling market selling souvenirs, traditional clothes and religious items.

name: Manipal Tiger Circle
text: Tiger Circle is a well known landmark in Manipal surrounded by cafes, restaurants and student hangouts.

name: Malpe Lighthouse Viewpoint
text: The Malpe lighthouse area provides panoramic views of the sea and fishing harbor.

name: Uchila Beach

name: Hejamadi Beach
text: Hejamadi Beach is known for clean sand and scenic estuary views near the Nandini river.

name: Mulki Beach
text: Mulki Beach is a popular surfing destination attracting international surfers.

name: Mulki Surfing School
text: Mulki surfing schools offer surfing lessons and water sports activities on the Arabian Sea coast.

name: Delta Point Kodi
text: Delta Point in Kodi Bengre offers views where the river meets the Arabian Sea.

name: Sasihithlu Beach
text: Sasihithlu Beach is famous for surfing competitions and scenic estuary landscapes.

name: Mangala Stadium
text: Mangala Stadium is a major sports stadium used for football and athletic events.

name: Pilikula Lake

name: Moodabidri Jain Basadis
text: Moodabidri is known for its ancient Jain basadis with intricate carvings and architecture.

name: Karkala Chaturmukha Basadi

name: Agumbe Rainforest Research Station

name: Jogigundi Falls

name: Barkana Falls

name: Onake Abbi Falls
text: Onake Abbi Falls requires a forest trek and offers spectacular waterfall views.

name: Kudremukh Peak Trek
text: Kudremukh Peak Trek is one of the most famous trekking routes in the Western Ghats.

name: Manipal Food Street
text: Manipal food street offers diverse street food and student friendly restaurants.

name: Hangyo Ice Cream Factory
text: Hangyo ice cream brand originated in Mangalore and is famous across Karnataka.

text: Mangalore fish market sells fresh seafood caught daily from Arabian Sea.

text: Kankanady market is a busy shopping area with local goods and food stalls.
